top_signals.title: Ether climbs toward $2K as Bitmine buys ETH, Robinhood L2 boost
top_signals.summary: ETH charts a path toward $2,000 as TradFi adoption, DAT buying and a long-awaited network upgrade boost investor interest.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Operations Platform SnowCloud Wants to Run Resorts By iPhone
top_signals.summary: Joe Hession, CEO and co-founder of SnowCloud, and Doug Pierini, CEO of Jackson Hole Mountain Resort, discussed efforts to move customer relations including sales and guest information on one platform. Pierini, whose resort uses SnowCloud, said that it has enhanced guest experiences now that guests expect to be able to buy anywhere they can use their phone.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Creating mining districts could unlock billions in value: study
top_signals.summary: Research suggests regional coordination could help miners overcome permitting, water and infrastructure constraints.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: South Korean Buddhism tests ‘hip’ boundaries in bid for Gen Z appeal
top_signals.summary: Even as the number of South Koreans who identify as Buddhist has remained static, Buddhism was viewed the most favorably of four belief systems in a 2025 survey.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
